title: Taraxacum
description: Taraxacum improves your Minecraft performance and gives some extra ambience and helpful features (e.g. minimap, Litematica, Chest Tracker ect.). It is almost completly client-side, so you can use it on any Vanilla server. It uses the Fabric/Quilt Loader
body:
# **Taraxacum**

**A Fabric (+ Quilt) client modpack**

Taraxacum improves your Minecraft performance and gives some extra ambience and helpful features (e.g. Minimap, Litematica, Chest Tracker ect.). It is almost completly client-side, so you can use it on any Vanilla server. It uses the Fabric/Quilt Loader.

#### **Modlist of newest version:**
* 3D Skin Layers
* Ambient Environment
* Animatica
* AppleSkin
* Architectury
* Axiom
* Balm
* Better Advancements
* Better Mount HUD
* Better Statistics Screen
* Betterbeds
* BetterPingDisplay
* Bobby
* Chest Tracker
* Client Commands
* Cloth Config API
* Collective
* Continuity
* Craft Presence
* Cube Without Borders (cwb)
* Custom Window Title
* Dark Loading Screen
* Debugify
* Default Options
* Dynamic FPS
* EasierVillagerTrading
* Elytra/Chestplate Swapper
* Emotecraft
* EnchDesc (Enchantment Descriptions)
* Entity Culling
* Entity Model Features
* Entity Texture Features
* Fabric API
* Fabric Language Kotlin
* Falling Leaves
* Fast Quit
* FerriteCore
* Flashback
* Forge Config API Port
* ImmediatelyFast
* Inventory Profiles Next
* Iris
* Krypton
* LambdaBetterGrass
* LambDynamicLights
* LanguageReload
* Lib IPN
* Light Overlay
* Litematica
* Lithium
* MaLiLib
* Make Bubbles Pop
* Midnight Lib
* Modmenu
* More Chat History
* MoreCulling
* No Chat Reports
* Not Enough Animations
* Opti GUI
* Overlaylib
* Placeholder API
* Player Animation Lib
* Prickle
* Raised (+ Add-ons)
* Reeses Sodium Options
* Remove Reloading Screen (rrls)
* Replanter Plus
* Searchables
* Server Resourcepack Checker
* ShulkerBoxTooltip
* Signcopy
* Simple Voice Chat
* Skyboxify
* Sodium
* Sodium Extra
* Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks
* Sound Controller
* Sound Physics Remastered
* Status Effect Bars
* Syncmatica
* TCDCommons API
* Techutils
* Too Many Shortcuts
* UniLib
* Visuality
* Vivecraft (VR)
* Voxy
* Voxy WorldGen
* Wavey Capes
* WorldEdit
* Xaeros Minimap
* Xaeros Worldmap
* Yet Another Config Lib
* Your Options Shall Be Respected (yosbr)
* Zoomify

#### **Disabled Mods due to version conflicts:**
* Advancement Info
* Advancement Plaques
* Amecs
* Beenfo
* Better Recipe Books
* Bookshelf
* Borderless Mining
* Clear Skies
* Craftify
* Detail Armor Bar
* Dynamic Sound Filters
* Eating Animation
* Enhanced Block Entities
* FabricSkyBoxes
* Iceberg
* Legendary Tooltips
* Mambience
* MemoryleakFix
* MixinTrace
* Model Gap Fix
* ModernFix
* Nvidium
* Prism


#### **Shaderpacks:**
* BSL Shaders
* Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
* Complementary Shaders - Unbound
* Rethinking Voxels

#### **Resource Packs:**
* Dramatic Skys
* Faithful 64x
* Fresh Animations
* Sodium Translations
* *Fast Better Grass (Disabled)*

#### **Removed Mods**:
* AntiGhost
* Custom Entity Models
* Dashloader
* Distant Horizons (replaced with Voxy)
* Effective + Illuminations
* Indium (now integrated into Sodium)
* Lazy DFU
* LinsAPI
* Logical Zoom (replaced by Zoomify)
* Sign Tools
* SlotLock
* Tips
* Title Changer (replaced by Custom Window Title)
